# Salty Horizon Exclusive Scuba Diving

> Private, personalized PADI scuba diving in Tamarindo, Costa Rica, with instructors Camille Segonne (PADI OWSI, MSDT) and Julien Escales (PADI OWSI). Trilingual: English, French, Spanish.

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.saltyhorizondiving.com/): overview, about the instructors, gallery, guest reviews, booking form, contact details
- [Experiences](https://www.saltyhorizondiving.com/experiences): Intro to Scuba (Pool) from $80, Discover Scuba Diving from $170, Fun Dive at the Catalina Islands from $130, Fun Dive at the Bat Islands (bull sharks, contact for pricing), Private Snorkeling from $80
- [PADI Courses](https://www.saltyhorizondiving.com/padi-courses): PADI Open Water Diver certification from $540, PADI Advanced Open Water Diver from $500
- [Private Charters](https://www.saltyhorizondiving.com/private-charters): fully customized private boat days combining scuba, snorkeling, paddle boarding, e-foil and jet ski
- [Scuba Diving in Tamarindo FAQ](https://www.saltyhorizondiving.com/scuba-diving-tamarindo-faq): 43 questions and answers on diving at the Catalina Islands and Bat Islands, marine life, manta ray and whale season, diving conditions, certification and booking

## Facts

- Location: Tamarindo, Guanacaste, Costa Rica
- Contact: +506 8775 9641 (WhatsApp), saltyhorizon.scuba@gmail.com
- Languages spoken: English, French, Spanish
- Main dive site: Catalina Islands (Islas Catalinas), Gulf of Papagayo, about 40 minutes by boat from Tamarindo
- Advanced dive site: Bat Islands (Islas Murciélago), known for bull shark encounters, May to November, Advanced Open Water certification required
